title: Export A List of Automations With Their Details All At Once
excerpt: I would like to be able to export a list of automations with their details for a board without having to review and open each of the individual automations one by one for auditing purposes.

posts.author: sshields (Sheryl)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to export a list of automations with their details for a board without having to review and open each of the individual automations one by one for auditing purposes.
